title: Gloomy Lighting
description: A pack that tweaks Minecraft's lighting system to make the environment more gloomy
body:
# Gloomy Lighting
A simple pack that changes Minecraft's lightmap texture using [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) that makes the player's surroundings darker and more gloomy.

# Dependencies
[![Polytone Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e82d3fb3564d63776112b8f8864d6ca036d7e4d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)

- Polytone is the only mod required to run the pack.
